subtasks.description: Fetch Adobe license inventory data from MongoDB (license counts, allocation dates, contract terms, renewal dates)
Fetch Adobe Q4 usage metrics from Snowflake (consumption by product, user activity, cost allocation)
Reconcile MongoDB license state with Snowflake Q4 usage, identify discrepancies, generate summary report with recommendations
Post reconciliation summary to #sam-team Slack channel

plan.cost_rationale: 4 subtasks total to minimize workflow steps: (1) MongoDB fetch is a simple single-pipeline query (small tier). (2) Snowflake Q4 usage is a straightforward SELECT with grouping (small tier). (3) Reconciliation combines both results, detects allocation gaps, and produces summary—moderately complex cross-source logic (mid tier). (4) Slack posting is a simple tool invocation (small tier, multitool_plan for enterprise registry integration). No policy_action added because the query does not request compliance evaluation or governance approval—only reconciliation and reporting. This plan stays within the 6 tool-call budget: 2 parallel fetch calls + 1 reconciliation call + up to 3 Slack integration calls within the multitool_plan step.

output.sql: SELECT cf.product, cf.publisher, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) as unique_users, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) as total_active_seats, SUM(cf.amount_usd) as total_cost_usd, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_id) as event_count FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.publisher = 'Adobe' AND cf.fiscal_quarter = 4 AND cf.event_date >= '2023-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2023-12-31' GROUP BY cf.product, cf.publisher ORDER BY cf.product

arguments.message:
*Adobe License Reconciliation Summary (Q4)*

*Overall Metrics:*
• Total Licensed Seats: 1,250
• Active Seats Q4: 1,087 (86.96% utilization)
• Licensed Value: $2,850,000
• Q4 Consumption Value: $2,156,400
• Cost Variance: $693,600 (24.32%)
• Active User Penetration: 71.36%

*Product Breakdown:*
• :large_green_circle: *Creative Cloud* — EXPAND: 90.7% utilization, strong adoption (750 seats, $1.69M)
• :large_yellow_circle: *Document Cloud* — HOLD: 76.3% utilization, stable (350 seats, $787.5K)
• :red_circle: *Experience Cloud* — AT RISK: lowest utilization, highest cost/seat $2,500 — consider consolidation (150 seats, $375K)

*Action Items:* Review Experience Cloud contract for right-sizing; expand Creative Cloud capacity planning.
